# Pull Request

## Summary

Explain what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Chore

## BES Checklist

- [ ] Code is modular and maintainable
- [ ] No dead code
- [ ] No unused imports
- [ ] No duplicated logic
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Tests added or updated if needed
- [ ] Architecture impact considered
- [ ] Security impact considered
- [ ] Build passes
- [ ] Ready for review

## Architecture Notes

Describe any architectural decisions or tradeoffs.

## Testing Notes

Explain how this was tested.
